edge_hypothesis: MACD histogram zero-line crossovers are capturing mean-reversion bounces in ranging markets (PF=1.87 ranging vs 0.82 transitional in prior ACCEPT). The MACD signal lags enough to filter noise but leads enough to catch directional legs within a range. By excluding transitional regimes (where price is choppy and directionless) and splitting into regime-specific variants, we isolate the ranging mean-reversion edge and the trending momentum-continuation edge separately. Wider TP ratios reduce fee drag — the prior ACCEPT's 189 trades at 62% fee-to-gross ratio suggests fewer, larger wins are the path to net profitability. Regime assumption: ranging (primary) and trending (secondary). Invalidation: if ranging PF < 1.2 across 80+ ranging trades, the mean-reversion hypothesis is wrong and MACD is just noise-fitting.

variants.name: macd_ranging_exploiter
variants.description: MACD zero-line cross optimized for ranging markets. Low ADX gate (<25) confirms consolidation where MACD mean-reversion works best. Wide TP (4x ATR) captures full range bounces. Tight stop (0.8x ATR) cuts losers fast in ranges where moves are bounded.
entry_long: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from negative to positive (histogram zero-line cross).
Close > EMA_50 confirms price above medium-term equilibrium.
entry_short: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from positive to negative (histogram zero-line cross).
Close < EMA_50 confirms price below medium-term equilibrium.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit long when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses below zero.
Exit short when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses above zero.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (4.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (0.8x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Ranging market breaks into trend, MACD reversal gets run over
risk_rules: Stop loss at 0.8x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 4.0x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: macd_trending_momentum
variants.description: MACD zero-line cross for trending-regime momentum continuation. ADX>25 confirms established trend where MACD cross signals acceleration. 3:1 R:R balances payoff with the higher win rate typical of trend-following signals. Tested against ETH/4h trending PF=1.23 baseline from prior ACCEPT.
entry_long: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from negative to positive (histogram zero-line cross).
entry_short: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from positive to negative (histogram zero-line cross).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit long when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses below zero.
Exit short when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses above zero.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Trend exhaustion — ADX starts declining after entry
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.0x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: macd_no_transitional_composite
variants.description: MACD zero-line cross with transitional regime excluded. Takes trades in both ranging AND trending regimes but blocks the transitional PF=0.82 zone that dragged the ACCEPT result from PF=1.50+ down to PF=1.35. Tests whether simple regime exclusion lifts overall PF without sacrificing trade count.
entry_long: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from negative to positive (histogram zero-line cross).
ADX_14 < 20 OR ADX_14 > 28 to exclude transitional regime (20-28 = transitional zone).
entry_short: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from positive to negative (histogram zero-line cross).
ADX_14 < 20 OR ADX_14 > 28 to exclude transitional regime (20-28 = transitional zone).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
Data required: ETH OHLCV on 4h and 1h
exit_rules: Exit long when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses below zero.
Exit short when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses above zero.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (0.9x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Transitional ADX zone definition (20-28) is wrong and excludes profitable trades
risk_rules: Stop loss at 0.9x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.5x ATR_14 from entry.
